title: Fashion Livestream Host Smiling UI Screenshot AI
sourceTitle: Fashion Livestream Host Smiling UI Screenshot AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable ui livestream screenshot with livestream interface screenshot simulation with modular panels, readable English UI labels, and believable creator content. Create a Douyin (English TikTok) livestream screenshot featuring a pretty female streamer going live. She is selling stockings and lingerie. The stream UI shows her current viewer count at 99,996, trending heat level marked as 18+, and a top fan named Xiaohu has just sent her an airplane v. vertical livestream screenshot framing Streamer. Subject: adult fashion livestream host smiling naturally at the phone camera. Platform Context: fictional short-video live app interface inspired by modern vertical livestreams. Live Room Theme: cozy desk setup with packaged fashion accessories and apparel samples, ring light reflection, and warm background shelves. Ui Modules: viewer count, pinned product card, scrolling comments, gift icons, like hearts, and live badge. Chat Energy: busy but readable comments with positive shopping questions and short reactions. Screen Style: 9:16 realistic smartphone screenshot, sharp UI, no real platform logo. Subject: Make adult fashion livestream host smiling naturally at the phone camera the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in cozy desk setup with packaged fashion accessories and apparel samples, ring light reflection, and warm background shelves. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use viewer count, pinned product card, scrolling comments, gift icons, like hearts, and live badge. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in 9:16 realistic smartphone screenshot, sharp UI, no real platform logo. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use the color system named or implied by the original prompt, anchored by: Create a Douyin (English TikTok) livestream screenshot featuring a pretty female streamer going live. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
